statement.en: Approaches to organoid vascularization and generation of human lymphatic vessel organoids from stem cells
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a thesis (presumably doctoral) with embargoed abstract content. The work describes experimental stem cell biology and organoid engineering—empirical research under active development. Classification cannot be definitive until: (1) embargo lifts and full abstract/methods are available, (2) peer review occurs, (3) reproducibility is established. Current state is provisional/in-progress.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 幹細胞から流動と構造が同時に立ち上がる奇妙な比率。
